name: code-to-linkedin
description: Create or synchronize a LinkedIn Skills section from actual code contributions.

interface.shortDescription: Build a LinkedIn skills plan from your code.
interface.longDescription: Analyzes codebases and Git contributions, compares them with an existing LinkedIn profile when available, and produces an actionable plan to add, keep, reorder, associate, demote, or remove developer skills.
defaultPrompt: Create a LinkedIn skills plan from my code.
Compare my code evidence with my LinkedIn skills.
Optimize my developer LinkedIn for a target role.
